speaker: agent
text: Hi, this is Riya calling from the insurer regarding your policy renewal.

speaker: customer
text: Sorry, can you repeat that, the line is breaking up.

speaker: agent
text: Sure — I'm calling about your policy renewal, is now a good time?

speaker: customer
text: Um, yeah I think so, hold on, my kid is asking me something.

speaker: customer
text: Okay sorry, I'm back. What was the question again?

speaker: agent
text: No problem. Your renewal date is coming up next month, just confirming your details are current.

speaker: customer
text: Yeah I think everything is the same, nothing has changed on my end.

speaker: agent
text: Great, that's all I needed. Have a good day.
